comments.post_body: ぷりんになりました。引き続きポスグレやりますので、よろしくお願いします。I have become a principal engineer at AWS, starting this month, always focused on making PostgreSQL better. Thanks all for your continuous support.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is announcing their new role as a principal engineer at AWS, where they will continue to work on improving PostgreSQL, and is thanking others for their support. They are expressing gratitude and looking forward to their new position.

comments.comment_body: Miron Sadziak Thanks! Glad to see that things are equally getting interesting on your side.

comments.post_body:
I’m happy to share that I’m starting a new position as Principal TPM Manager! I'll work harder for my team members, customers' outcome, and our organization growth.

----
Lead a cross‑discipline engineering team including Data Scientists, Software engineers, and Technical Program Managers. Operating with a portfolio mindset to deliver high‑impact customer outcomes while coaching talent, modeling engineering excellence, and strengthening Industry Solutions Engineering team’s multidisciplinary operating model.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the author on their new position as Principal TPM Manager, where they will lead a cross-discipline engineering team to deliver high-impact customer outcomes. The commenter is responding to the author's announcement of their new role and the responsibilities that come with it.

comments.post_body:
Great day - the beginning of our innovation and technology exchange mission in Taiwan. 
Our company ScanTheSun selected among 10 best innovative and promising ones to represent Poland at innoVEX Polish pavilion in Taipei as well as the Polish Agency for Enterprise Development mission in Taiwan.
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about ScanTheSun's selection as one of the top innovative companies to represent Poland at the innoVEX Polish pavilion in Taipei. The post announces the beginning of the company's innovation and technology exchange mission in Taiwan.

comments.post_body: Thrilled to join BNY as Head of Asia Pacific Securities Financing & Global Collateral. I look forward to further enhancing our solutions and helping clients navigate the complexities of the region. It’s an exciting opportunity to contribute to BNY’s strategic growth and to be a part of a dynamic team committed to delivering excellence. Thank you to everyone for the warm welcome!
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about a new role as Head of Asia Pacific Securities Financing & Global Collateral at BNY, where the author expresses excitement about contributing to the company's growth and helping clients navigate regional complexities. The commenter is likely offering congratulations or welcome wishes to the author in their new position.
